name: medsync8-billing
description: CoCM/BHI billing decision support for psychiatric practices: CMS midpoint-rule eligibility (99492/99493/99494/G2214/99484), full code catalogue including CY2026 APCM add-ons, three-payer rate model, claim pricing, whole-panel evaluation, and an adversarial billing auditor. Decision-support only — verify against the current CMS Physician Fee Schedule.
